# SUPPORT_MATRIX

<!-- Generated by `agent-runtime render --target support-matrix`; edit `manifests/surfaces.yaml`. -->

Unified human-readable view of which Codex and Claude harness primitives `agent-runtime-kit` ships into today, by what mechanism, and at what version floor.
